title: CP9 Battles in the Tower of Justice: Key Exchange

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Good Lord, I'm finally in the kitchen!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: This isn't the time for that!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: DON'T YOU WANT TO SAVE NICO ROBIN!!?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: What idiot becomes stronger with Cola!!?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: How much longer will you be quarreling?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It's rude to enjoy a leisurely tea-time
